entities.worker: a construction worker in a hard hat

scenes.title: The Construction Site
scenes.background_prompt: An urban construction site with a concrete foundation, steel beams rising, scaffolding, a crane in the background, and a chain-link fence. Midday. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: An urban construction site at midday. A construction worker in an orange hard hat, a high-visibility vest, and work boots stands on a concrete slab, studying a blueprint rolled out on a makeshift table of stacked cinder blocks. Behind him, a building is half-built: the lower floors have concrete walls and windows installed, while the upper floors are still exposed steel beams and scaffolding covered in blue safety netting. A tall yellow crane looms behind the structure, its arm extended. Piles of lumber, rebar, and bags of cement are stacked near the chain-link fence that surrounds the site. A sign on the fence reads 'Coming Soon: Greenfield Apartments' with an artist's rendering of the finished building — a sharp contrast to the current skeletal state.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place worker on the concrete slab, standing and studying a blueprint on a makeshift table of stacked cinder blocks.
